title: 'We're used to rain': UK PM Keir Starmer at Paris Olympics getting drenched; pic goes viral - Times of India
description: UK News: British PM Keir Starmer on Saturday made headlines after he was photographed at the 2024 Paris Olympics opening ceremony not wearing a protective plas.
